description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Doxygen documentation that runs on push to master, develop, actions_shared branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master and develop. Use an ubuntu-latest job to install Doxygen, extract the CoolProp version from CMakeLists.txt, build documentation with Doxygen, zip the HTML documentation, and upload the resulting archive as a release artifact if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
